title: Kenyan Roti
description: A traditional Kenyan flatbread recipe made with simple ingredients and cooked on a griddle. Serve with your favorite accompaniments.
instructions: Combine doughy and knead in a large mixing bowl.
Knead the mixture for the specified amount of time until it forms a smooth dough.
Divide the dough into 4-6 equal portions, depending on desired roti size.
Roll each portion into a thin circle.
Heat a non-stick griddle over medium heat.
Cook the roti for 1-2 minutes on each side, until it's lightly browned and puffed.
Brush with oil and garnish with crispy for added flavor.
Serve hot with your favorite accompaniments.
